results.rendered_html: prādur ind. (prob. fr. prā = pra + dur, ‘out of doors’; prā-dus, g. svar-ādi; ˚duṣ before k and p,  Pāṇ. viii, 3, 41 ; ˚duḥ ṣyāt, ṣanti for syāt, santi, 87 ) forth, to view or light, in sight,  AV.  &c. &c. (with √as, or bhū, to become manifest, be visible or audible, appear, arise, exist; with √kṛ, to make visible or manifest, cause to appear, reveal, disclose).
